caption: A woman with long dark hair is seated in an indoor setting, wearing a purple and white striped button-down shirt and a black headset with a microphone extending toward her mouth. She is positioned in front of a light-colored wall and a window draped with a sheer yellow curtain and a blue accent curtain. The text "Nancy Ramya" is visible in the bottom-left corner of each scene. As the video progresses, the woman looks directly into the camera while speaking, her mouth opening and closing in natural conversation. Her facial expressions shift slightly, and she maintains a steady gaze throughout the sequence. The background and her posture remain constant, while the only movement is her facial animation as she talks.
